rootCause: Each tab mutated in-memory game state captured at initial load; concurrent item buys/sells, process changes, and quest writes could overwrite newer state from another tab because writes did not verify freshness before mutation.
resolution: Persist a lightweight game-state summary (checksum + dUSD + lastUpdated), refresh in-memory state when checksums diverge before reads/mutations, and add periodic checksum polling in quest/process/item UI so cross-tab updates are adopted quickly.
